body: PT Lippo General Insurance TBK will undergo a 1:10 stock split, increasing the number of shares from 300 million to 3 billion, with each new share valued at IDR 50, down from IDR 500. The plan, approved by shareholders and the Indonesia Stock Exchange Authority, is set to take effect next week, with the company's stock price currently standing at IDR 3,460 per share.
title: Lippo General Insurance to Implement 1:10 Stock Split, Increasing Shares to 3 Billion.

body: Bank Panin will issue a shelf-registration bond IV phase II worth IDR 3.91 trillion, part of a larger IDR 15 trillion public offering program, with proceeds to be used for working capital and business expansion, particularly credit distribution. The bond issuance, rated "IDAA" by Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia, will take place from September 25 to October 1, 2024, with electronic distribution and listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange to follow.
title: Bank Panin to Issue IDR 3.91 Trillion Bond as Part of IDR 15 Trillion Shelf-Registration Program
